name: Holy Exhaustion!
text: Give to the Bruce Wayne player. Allies you control cannot ready. When Revealed: Exhaust each ally you control. If no allies were exhausted this way, this card gains surge. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust your identity → remove Holy Exhaustion! from the game.

name: Cat Got Your Cape?
text: Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, each player tucks a random card from their hand under here. When Defeated: Discard each card under here and place threat on the main scheme equal to the number of cards discarded.

name: Catwoman
text: Patrol. [star] Forced Response: After Catwoman attacks you, discard an upgrade you control. If you cannot, place 1 threat on the main scheme. (Batman's nemesis minion.)

flavor: "Oh Batman, it seems you've used up all your lives -too bad I still have plenty left."
name: Purr-Fectly Trapped!
text: When Revealed: Heal all damage from Catwoman and she activates against you. If she is not in play, discard the top card of your deck and take indirect damage equal to that cards printed cost.

name: Clawed Ambush
text: Attach to your identity. Forced Response: After your turn ends, take 1 damage. Alter-Ego Interrupt: When you make a basic recovery, discard this card instead of healing damage.

flavor: "A scheme so diabolical, so clever, so egg-cellent, no one can stop me!"
name: Shell Shocked
text: As an additional cost to thwart this scheme, you must spend a [mental] resource. When Defeated: Confuse your identity.

flavor: My mind is simply too egg-ceptional for you, Batman!"
name: Egghead
text: Incite 1. Patrol. [star] After Egghead attacks you, place 1 threat on each scheme. (Batman's nemesis minion.)

flavor: “You put all your eggs in one basket Egghead, a fatal mistake!” -Batman
name: Eggstreme Peril
text: Attach to your identity. While Eggstreme Peril is attached to your identity, you are confused and cannot ready. Hero Action: Dramatically say this card's flavor text and spend 1 physical and 1 energy resource → discard this card.

flavor: “Oh, what a devilishy, devious dozen of dastardly deeds I have planned for you, Dynamic Duo!”
name: Eggs-Quisite Trap
text: When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage. If Egghead is in play, he schemes. Otherwise, find Egghead and put him into play engaged with you.

flavor: "It's a crime to be this funny!"
name: The Joker's Wild!
text: When Revealed: Each player discards the top 5 cards of their deck. Place 1 additional threat here for each [star] resource discarded this way. If no additional threat was placed this way, this card gains surge.

flavor: “A joke a day keeps the gloom away.”
name: Joker
text: Villainous. When Defeated: The player who defeated Joker is stunned. If they are already stunned, they take 2 damage. (Batman's nemesis minion.)

name: Exploding Punchline
text: Attach to your identity. Forced Interrupt: When your turn begins, place 1 bomb counter here, then take 1 damage for each bomb counter here. Hero Action: Spend 3 resources of different types → discard this card.

name: The Worst Is Yet To Come...
text: When Revealed: Say this cards flavor text and choose: • Spend 2 different resources. • Confuse your identity. • Stun your identity.

flavor: "Surprise! It's a gift that keeps on booming!"
name: The Last Laugh
text:
When Revealed: Discard an upgrade you control that generates a [star] resource. If no upgrade was discarded this way, take 2 damage.
[star] Boost: If this attack is undefended, discard an upgrade you control.

flavor: "Shiver in fear, Dynamic Dolts -soon you'll be Bat-sicles!"
name: The Ice Age Cometh!
text: Forced Interrupt: When the villain phase begins, place 1 freeze counter here. If there are at least 2 freeze counters here, discard this card and each player takes 2 indirect damage.

name: Mr. Freeze
text: Reduce the amount of damage Mr. Freeze takes from each attack by 1 for each cold counter on him. [star] Forced Response: After Mr. Freeze activates, place 1 cold counter on him. (Batman's nemesis minion.)

name: Freeze Gun
text:
Attach to the minion with the most remaining hit points. If you cannot, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a minion, put it into play engaged with you, and attach this card to it.
[star] Attached minion's attacks gain overkill and ranged.

flavor: "Your crime-fighting days are on ice, Caped Crusader!"
name: Freeze Play
text: When Revealed: Mr. Freeze activates against you. If Mr. Freeze is not in play, stun your identity and place 1 threat on the main scheme.

flavor: "A high class joint for Gotham's elite -or a front for the Penguin's criminal empire?"
name: The Iceberg Lounge
text: This card cannot leave play until there are 4 VIP counters here. Forced Interrupt: When threat would be removed from this scheme, remove 1 threat instead and add 1 VIP counter here. Then if there are at least 4 VIP counters here discard this card.

name: Penguin
text: Penguin cannot take damage while the Iceberg Lounge side scheme is in play. [star] Forced Response: After Penguin schemes, deal 1 damage to the engaged player's identity. (Batman's nemesis minion.)

name: Fowl Play
text: When Revealed: Exhaust your identity. Take 2 damage. If the Iceberg Lounge side scheme is in play, remove 1 counter from it and place 1 threat on the main scheme.

name: Goon
text: Quickstrike. [star] Forced Response: After this minion activates, it engages another player and activates again. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: Outwitting Batman is my sole delight.
name: Riddle Me This, Batman!
text: When Defeated: Confuse your identity and find the Riddler minion and put him into play engaged with the first player. [acceleration]

name: Riddler
text: Incite 1. Patrol. [star] Riddler gets +1 hit point for each resource attached to him. [star] Forced Response: After Riddler engages you or activates against you, choose 1 card from your hand with a printed [mental] resource and attach it to him.

name: Riddled With Peril
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Place threat on the main scheme equal to the total number of [mental] resources in your hand. When Revealed (Hero): Take indirect damage equal to the total number of [mental] resources in your hand.

flavor: "If a Bat can't fly and a Robin can't hop, what happens when the train won't stop?"
name: Conundrum At Full Steam!
text: Attach to your identity. While Conundrum at Full Steam is attached to your identity, you are stunned and cannot ready. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [mental] resources → discard this card.

flavor: “Caught in the act, you fiend! I deduced your dastardly deed before you even began!”
name: Dynamic Entrance
text: Permanent. Linked (Dynamic Ascent). Response: After a minion enters play, deal 1 damage to it.
